## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- RFBrowser Version: [e.g. 0.2.0]
- Flutter Version: [e.g. 3.24.0]

Any other context about the problem.
